prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约446名，2023年前移至402名，2024年后移至552名，2025年回升至473名；近四年整体波动区间402-552名，2025年基准约473名，呈震荡走势。\ n该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022-2023年均为11人，2024年增至12人，2025年扩至17人；2026年计划14人，较2025年缩招约17.6%，竞争略有缓解。985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第33名，近年排名稳定在28-33区间，属于国内顶尖理工类院校。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉 评价偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第33（较热），短视频平台关注度处于中上水平；电子科学 与技术A+、信息与通信工程A+、计算机科学与技术A，均为电子信息类核心学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年评 为"高热推荐"，计算机类评为"推荐"，相关专业大类持续升温；宁夏2026年物理类考生约44550人，与2025年44491人基本持平，竞争环境稳定。电子科技大学位于四川成都，在宁夏招生规模较小（11-17人），属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次473名 、2026年缩招约17.6%（位次前移动力）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）及专业热度持续（吸引力不减），预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移；预测最低位次约433名，区间368-49 8名。

- 计算机类。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间368-498名内，建议以二档电子信息类（信息与通信）和工科试验班（电子工程类）为主攻方向，一档集成电路设计与集成系统和计算机类作为冲刺，三档智能仪 器、智能控制及地球科学复合培养作为保底。电子科技大学电子信息类学科实力突出（A+学科集中），报考热度持续，建议合理梯度填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 446, moving forward to 402 in 2023, then backward to 552 in 2024, and recovering to 473 in 2025; the overall fluctuation range over the past four years is 402-552, with a baseline of about 473 in 2025, showing a volatile trend.\ nThe university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia was 11 students in both 2022 and 2023, increased to 12 in 2024, and expanded to 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14 students, a reduction of about 17.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 33rd, with a stable ranking range of 28-33 in recent years, belonging to the top domestic science and engineering institutions.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, which may mildly suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level; Electronic Science and Technology is A+, Information and Communication Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, all core disciplines in the electronic information field, highly matching the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, Computer majors as 'recommended', with related major categories continuing to heat up; Ningxia's 2026 physics category candidates are approximately 44,550, basically flat with 44,491 in 2025, maintaining a stable competitive environment. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, with a small enrollment scale in Ningxia (11-17 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 473, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 17.6% (driving ranking forward), slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and sustained major popularity (undiminished attraction), the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 433, with a range of 368-498.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 368-498, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Electronic Information Category (Information and Communication) and Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering Category) as main targets, Tier 1 Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems and Computer Category as sprint options, and Tier 3 Smart Instruments, Smart Control, and Earth Science Composite Training as safety choices. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China has outstanding electronic information disciplines (concentrated A+ disciplines), with sustained application popularity, so a reasonable gradient filling is advised.
